summary: Iteration 103 testing complete. All requested features verified: 1) Blog page loads with 5 articles (3 seed + 2 AI-generated), 2) Individual blog article pages render full content with sections/intro/conclusion, 3) Blog seed endpoint is idempotent (returns seeded:0), 4) Product quiz flow works (4 questions, personalized results, email capture), 5) Social proof toast appears after ~8 seconds on marketing pages, 6) Tool recommender on comparison pages works (3 questions, recommendation), 7) Share buttons appear on /tools page after calculator use, 8) Image lazy loading implemented across 20+ components using loading='lazy' attribute.
passed_tests: GET /api/blog/posts/how-to-validate-product-idea-uk - returns full article with sections
GET /api/blog/posts/uk-vat-ecommerce-sellers-guide-2026 - returns full article with sections
GET /api/blog/posts/tiktok-shop-uk-worth-it-2026 - returns full article with sections
GET /api/leads/share-result - returns share object with title, text, url
/blog page loads with 5 articles showing titles, categories, tags
/product-quiz - quiz flow works (select answers, see results)
Tool Recommender - shows recommendation result with CTA
/tools page - ShareResult component visible after calculator input
/tools page - Copy and Twitter share buttons visible
Social proof toast appears after ~8 seconds on marketing pages
Social proof toast shows random UK name, city, and action (MOCKED data)
Image lazy loading - 6/6 images on homepage have loading='lazy'
Image lazy loading - implemented across 20+ component files
critical_code_review_comments: Blog seed articles are well-structured with intro, sections, conclusion - good SEO content
Blog seed endpoint correctly checks for existing slugs before inserting (idempotent)
send_lead_subscriber_digest task registered with cron '0 9 * * 1' (Monday 9 AM UTC) - cannot be triggered in test
LazyImage component exists but most components use native loading='lazy' attribute directly - both approaches are valid
Social proof toast uses MOCKED random UK names/cities - intentional per design
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 103 tested new features: 1) Blog system with 5 articles (3 seed at /blog/how-to-validate-product-idea-uk, /blog/uk-vat-ecommerce-sellers-guide-2026, /blog/tiktok-shop-uk-worth-it-2026 + 2 AI-generated). 2) Blog seed endpoint POST /api/blog/seed is idempotent. 3) Product quiz at /product-quiz has 4 questions (channel, stage, challenge, budget) with personalized recommendations. 4) Social proof toast in SocialProofToast.jsx appears after 8 seconds on marketing pages using LandingLayout. 5) Tool recommender in ToolRecommender.jsx on comparison pages has 3 questions. 6) Share buttons in ShareResult.jsx appear on /tools page after calculator use. 7) Image lazy loading implemented via native loading='lazy' attribute across 20+ components. 8) Weekly digest cron task send_lead_subscriber_digest registered at '0 9 * * 1' (Monday 9 AM UTC).
